# Endangered Creations

> Endangered Creations is a full-service production company founded by Erica D. Hayes, one of the top lighting designers and directors in the United States. Based in Los Angeles, specializing in music videos, concert visuals, and cinematic content for artists and brands.

## About Endangered Creations

Endangered Creations is a Los Angeles-based production company built on a passion for visual storytelling. From concert stages to music videos, the company brings artistic visions to life through cinematic production and creative direction.

Founded by Erica D. Hayes—one of the top lighting designers, lighting directors, and grandMA programmers in the United States—Endangered Creations combines technical expertise with bold creative vision. Erica is an IATSE Local 728 member with 16+ years of experience in live entertainment.

## Services

- **Music Video Production:** Concept development, directing, and post-production
- **Concert Visuals:** LED content, IMAG, and live video direction
- **Lighting Design:** Concert, TV, and film lighting by Erica D. Hayes
- **Branded Content:** Commercial and promotional video production
- **Creative Direction:** Visual identity and artistic direction

## Leadership

- **Erica D. Hayes** — Founder & Creative Director. One of the top lighting designers in the United States. IATSE Local 728 member. Principal of Endangered LX.

## Notable Artists

The Isley Brothers, Fantasia, Jason Derulo, Amaarae, Stonebwoy, Lucky Daye, Ledisi, Sombr

## Location

Los Angeles, California, USA

## Related Companies

- [Endangered LX](https://endangeredlx.com) — Lighting design and production
- [Erica D. Hayes](https://ericadhayes.com) — Portfolio and services
- [Crew Development Institute](https://cdi-global.org) — Nonprofit training African technicians
